Name: ITEMLOT_PARAM_ST
Description:
Defines item lots that can be rolled upon item pickup, enemy death or granted via script.
When doing this, consecutive IDs are also rolled.
A single result is produced by each row.
A row will not be rolled if the flag is already set.

Fields.Name: Cumulative Award Item Flag
Fields.Description: Holds the number of drawings for cumulative lots. The base event flag specified here + cumulateNumMax are used to save the number of drawings.

Fields.Name: Cumulative Max Draw Count
Fields.Description: The maximum number of lottery draws for cumulative lots.

Fields.Name: Rarity
Fields.Description: Determines the SFX used to display the rarity of the treasure lot.
